messages.message: 'Ico' is assigned a value but never used.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Error: Cannot call impure function during render `Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent). /home/fedjio/.gemini/antigravity/scratch/school-erp/frontend/src/pages/scolarite/ElevesList.tsx:86:53 84 | 85 | > 86 | #{eleve.matricule || Math.floor(Math.random() * 10000)} | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function 87 | 88 | 89 | {eleve.nom} {eleve.prenom}
